title: Specify source-adapter Evidence
description: Validates a single source-adapter `Evidence` document per RFC-25 §Source adapter contract — the per-source result of `extract`, persisted under `.specify/slices/<slice>/evidence/<source-key>.yaml`. Top-level fields: `source` (kebab-case source key), `adapter` (kebab-case adapter id), `authority` (closed enum `intent | documentation | behaviour`), `candidate` (kebab-case candidate id from `discovery.md`), and `claims[]`. Each claim carries a closed `kind` from {intent, requirement, criterion, decision, section, diagram, contract, excerpt, type, call, region, container, leaf} — the last three are the spatial kinds co-introduced with the `screenshots` source adapter (RFC-25 §W2.4). `claim-id` is required on `requirement` and `criterion` kinds and optional on others; `path` matches the grammar `<path>` | `<path>#L<n>` | `<path>#L<start>-L<end>`. Per-kind body fields (`statement`, `criterion`, `decision`, etc.) are intentionally open.

source.description: Source key (matches a top-level `plan.yaml.sources.<key>` binding) the Evidence was extracted from.

authority.description: Authority class for this Evidence per RFC-25 §Authority hierarchy. Closed enum.

candidate.description: Candidate id (matches a `## Candidate inventory` block in `discovery.md`) the Evidence is bound to.

claims.description: Per-claim extraction records. Empty `claims: []` is valid; failure is signalled by not writing the Evidence file at all.

claimKind.description: Closed claim-kind enum. New kinds require an RFC update.

claim-id.description: Stable claim identifier. Required when `kind` is `requirement` or `criterion`; optional on other kinds.
